title: tussacia sessiliflora
intro: Tussacia sessiliflora, also known as the European Yarrow, is a flowering plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of European Yarrow lie in its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. It is valued for its health benefits, including its potential to support the immune system, reduce fever, and ease menstrual cramps. European Yarrow can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal properties, making it a versatile herb in traditional herbal medicine.
